steps.title: Identify the key weakness
steps.content: Ollerton observes that Rosas-Guerrero et al. “may have inadvertently excluded studies published before the term 'pollinator effectiveness' came into common use”—a potential flaw in the research methodology.

steps.title: Match the flaw to the answer
steps.content: D states what Ollerton implies: a methodological limitation that weakens the study's conclusion. A treats the exclusion as beneficial, B reverses it to an inclusion problem, and C blames species count. This matches choice D — D is correct.
